$schema: RateGuard cross-language conformance vectors — budget attestation expiry formatting.
description: Proves Go, Node, and Python format a BudgetGrant's expires_at identically inside the Ed25519 signing payload. Each SDK's own time.Time/Date/datetime JSON serialization disagrees on fractional-second rendering (Go trims trailing zeros, Python emits fixed microseconds, Node emits fixed milliseconds) — three different byte strings for the same instant, which breaks cross-language signature verification. The fix truncates to whole seconds before formatting, so the fractional component never appears. See AGENTS.md rule 13.

cases.note: exact whole second — no fractional part to begin with
half-second — truncated away, NOT rounded to :01
999ms — truncated down, stays in the same second
